item.title: Being queer has always been about resistance too the systems of oppression against queer people and first and foremost that mean...
item.description:
Being queer has always been about resistance too the systems of oppression against queer people and first and foremost that means the freedom from g*nocide. So yes, if you can’t get behind that you’re not queer.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Would you be proud to be an Israeli?
item.description:
Would you be proud to be an Israeli? A Rhodesian? I don’t think so and America is the blueprint for all of those.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: The contradictions of colonialism are only becoming more and more apparent so much so that they are demonstrating themselves wit...
item.description:
The contradictions of colonialism are only becoming more and more apparent so much so that they are demonstrating themselves within one person, and that will never not be at least sardonically funny to me



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I’m so incredibly sick and tired of people that just blind themselves to how ideologies that were created by fascists are now be...
item.description:
I’m so incredibly sick and tired of people that just blind themselves to how ideologies that were created by fascists are now being recreated by fascists they are not that clever and the only way you don’t recognise this is if you actively blind yourself to them repeating the exact same shit



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They pay WELLLLLL tho goddamn - and bts I don’t rly judge ppl for taking their ads (by existing on this app we are making conten...
item.description:
They pay WELLLLLL tho goddamn - and bts I don’t rly judge ppl for taking their ads (by existing on this app we are making content they use to advertise on anyway, might as well get their money directly) but insofar as there is a gross and bad advertiser, yea it’s the one lobbying our govt to legitimatise insider trading



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
